summary: First-iteration end-to-end testing of On The Tools website. All 16 backend pytest cases pass (auth, products CRUD, messages CRUD/reply, public message submission, auth-protection on admin endpoints). All 21 frontend flows from the request work as expected: home loads, navbar logo transparent, products list (3 seeded) navigates to detail with Amazon Buy Now (target=_blank) and Buy In Bulk, contact form submits & shows ENQUIRY RECEIVED, /admin protected route redirects to /admin/login, admin login works with seeded creds, messages inbox renders, reply persists in thread, products tab can Add/Edit/Delete products with toast, mobile hamburger opens full menu with all nav links.

minor.issue: Endpoints that only verify auth via Depends(get_current_admin) currently allow any logged-in user as long as role=='admin'. Acceptable for MVP but no role granularity for future.

issues: Browser console warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' Likely from a scroll-tracking lib (framer-motion). Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) silence framer-motion useScroll warning by giving the scroll container `position: relative`.
(Optional) consider rate-limiting POST /api/messages to prevent spam (no critical issue today).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 442-line module which is OK for current size; if more domains are added, split into routers/auth.py, routers/products.py, routers/messages.py.
JWT_SECRET is loaded from env (good). bcrypt hashing used correctly ($2b$ format).
All Mongo reads exclude _id correctly via projection {'_id': 0}.
Pydantic models used for request validation; no raw input trusted.
All interactive frontend elements have data-testid attributes — excellent testability.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL through /lib/api.js axios instance — no hardcoded URLs.
Auth uses Bearer token stored in localStorage under 'ott_token' (matches problem statement context).
Seed admin function correctly upserts admin password if it has changed in env — matches playbook expectation.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up a test product 'TEST UI Disc 2026' and 2 test contact messages via UI flows; all removed via DELETE API at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, products CRUD, messages CRUD with reply. Use as regression on future iterations. Public BASE URL: https://website-builder-1725.preview.emergentagent.com. data-testids in use: contact-full-name/company/phone/email/quantity/message, contact-submit, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-logo-link, site-logo, admin uses placeholder-based selectors for product form (Product name, Short description, Full description, Image URL, Amazon URL).
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA. Two false-negative test failures in the first Playwright pass were due to my own selectors (case-sensitive substring match on body text that the site renders uppercased; and text-content lookup on an icon-only hamburger button). Re-runs with corrected selectors confirmed both flows work.
